_world._note: Dimensions from WORLD const in data/neighborhoodLayout.js. No getWorldSize() method.

marker_circle._note: Uniform radius and stroke applied to every location marker circle in the per-location loop.

marker_label._note: Label text placed at y + 30 below each marker center. Relative offset in per-location loop.

marker_prompt._note: Enter/lock prompt placed at y - 34 above each marker center. Same offset for unlocked and locked branches.

marker_quest_indicator._note: Quest exclamation mark placed at x + 18, y - 18 relative to marker center.

progress_bar._note: Progress bar (background + fill) for partially-unlocked markers. Placed at y + 42 below marker center. barW=40, height=4.

map_label._note: Static scene label at bottom-center. Original: x = WORLD.width / 2 (1536/2=768), y = WORLD.height - 14 (1024-14=1010).
